source.title: Star Atlas Weekly News Recap #64
source.author: Intergalactic Herald
source.classification_rationale: Weekly newsletter/recap aggregates developments and linked sources.

summary.neutral_abstract: Welcome to the Star Atlas weekly recap from the Intergalactic Herald. Below is what happened with Star Atlas this past week. We are looking for guests to be on our podcast. The podcast is a discussion of the past week’s news about Star Atlas. If you are interested in being on the podcast, please contact us. The Hologram published an article about a new Star Atlas project called Dark Core
summary.historical_value: Contemporary Intergalactic Herald publication preserved with role and attribution boundaries.
summary.current_validity_warning: Summaries, roadmaps, operational details, and attributed statements require reconciliation with primary and later sources.

article_text:
Welcome to the Star Atlas weekly recap from the Intergalactic Herald. Below is what happened with Star Atlas this past week.
We are looking for guests to be on our podcast. The podcast is a discussion of the past week’s news about Star Atlas. If you are interested in being on the podcast, please contact us.
Star Atlas Showroom Recap News
Beyond the Horizon posted a video recap of the Star Atlas Townhall.
Italian Star Atlas Player Wins $30K Starship Prize
The Hologram published an article about a winner in Star Atlas Escape Velocity.
Star Atlas Pearce X6 in New Showroom 4k!
Beyond the Horizon posted a video review of the Pearce X6.
Metaverse Nomads #97 $30k Ship won in Star Atlas: Escape Velocity
Metaverse Nomads posted a video of their weekly Star Atlas live stream.
Star Atlas Fimbul Mamba 4k Showroom!
Beyond the Horizon posted a video review of the Fimbul Mamba.
Alkemo Launches Dark Core Roasters Coffee
The Hologram published an article about a new Star Atlas project called Dark Core Roasters.
Existing ATLAS Pair Spaceships Return to the Galactic Marketplace at 20% Discount to Fuel the Star Atlas Economy
Star Atlas published an article about changes to the Star Atlas Marketplace.
WEEKLY STAR ATLAS NEWSLETTER #82
Aephia published their weekly Star Atlas newsletter.
STAR ATLAS #183 Your 1% Counts
MetaVerse Explorer posted a video about improving his YouTube channel.
Popular Star Atlas Guild Website to Shut Down
The Hologram published an article about a Star Atlas guild website shutting down.
#4 | Showroom 2.1, Surge Events & MORE!!! | Star Atlas
Atlas Cartographer posted a video of updates in Star Atlas.
Star Atlas Showroom w/SW4GN3R
Brycent posted a video on Twitch interviewing Star Atlas CEO Michael Wagner.
Star Atlas News Showroom 2.1 Release And Upcoming DAO
The Hologram posted a video of Star Atlas news.
Star Atlas Showroom : Santi got robbed
PockThePirate posted a video about updates in Star Atlas.
Star Atlas – Showroom R2.1 Flight Instruction
Star Atlas posted a video about about flight instruction in the latest release of the Star Atlas Showroom.
Claim Your Destiny: The Dawn of the Player-Driven Star Atlas Economy
Star Atlas published an article about changes to the Star Atlas economy.
Star Atlas: First Impressions and a Look Into The Future
Tomorrows World posted a video about his first impressions of the Star Atlas Showroom.
BREAKING – Star Atlas DAO Supply of R4 Ends, Player Economy Begins
The Hologram News Network posted a video about changes to the Star Atlas economy.
Star Atlas R4 News Everything is Changing!
Beyond the Horizon posted a video about changes to the R4 resources.
STAR ATLAS #184 HOLY CRAP | R4 Resources ARE GONE!
MetaVerse Explorer posted a video about changes to the R4 resources in Star Atlas.
SA Economy Begins!!! Solona declared a Security?
Gladiator posted a video about changes in the Star Atlas economy.
Star Atlas Showroom 2.1 Free Flying in the Verse
Club Grist posted a video about flying in Star Atlas.
